items.summary: arXiv:2607.20604v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We present a systematic study of the currently available ALMA millimeter polarimetric sample of gamma-ray burst (GRB) afterglows. Our sample comprises 24 observations (20 new) of 11 long-duration GRBs spanning $\approx0.1$-87 days a…
